---
title: &TITLE Owen Godwin
last: Godwin
first: Owen
people_group: "tech"
email: ekb123@uw.edu
education:
  - Musician | Experimental luthier
subtitle: "Musician | Experimental Luthier"
#altsubtitle: "Graduate Student"
#alteducation: "Ph.D. Chemistry | University of Washington"
description: ""
image: avatar.png
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs
  contents:
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Github
      href: mailto:ekb123@uw.edu
---

<hr>


:::{#about}

Owen Goodwin is a musician / experimental luthier or synthesizer builder/engineer who specializes in building applications and instruments for a wide variety of musical productions.

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
